comments.content: Create list of available files in Source directory (using ls).
Insert file names into table JOB_SCHEDULE
Create file list to work with in LOOP (one string, comma seperated) (using cat).
Write date into seperate LOG file (using echo).
Interim Table LOAD Job-Sequence for IIP Project

inputs.name: script
inputs.value:
echo "cat" > $command_name_PATH
cat ${TMP_DIR}/${FIDINIT}_${FILE_LST}_mov.txt | awk '{ printf "%s\n",$1 }' | awk ' { NR==1?s=$1:s=s "," $1} END { printf "%s",s }'
